mapper.update:
update server_resources set sales_status = 'NOT_SALE', resource_tenant = null, lease_expiration_time=null where id in
#{item}

update server_resources set sales_status = CASE WHEN DATE_SUB(lease_expiration_time, INTERVAL 1 YEAR) <= NOW() THEN 'NOT_SALE' ELSE sales_status END, resource_tenant = CASE WHEN DATE_SUB(lease_expiration_time, INTERVAL 1 YEAR) <= NOW() THEN NULL ELSE resource_tenant END, lease_expiration_time= CASE WHEN DATE_SUB(lease_expiration_time, INTERVAL 1 YEAR) <= NOW() THEN NULL ELSE DATE_SUB(lease_expiration_time, INTERVAL 1 YEAR) END where id in
#{item}

update server_resources set sales_status = CASE WHEN DATE_SUB(lease_expiration_time, INTERVAL 1 MONTH ) <= NOW() THEN 'NOT_SALE' ELSE sales_status END, resource_tenant = CASE WHEN DATE_SUB(lease_expiration_time, INTERVAL 1 MONTH) <= NOW() THEN NULL ELSE resource_tenant END, lease_expiration_time= CASE WHEN DATE_SUB(lease_expiration_time, INTERVAL 1 MONTH) <= NOW() THEN NULL ELSE DATE_SUB(lease_expiration_time, INTERVAL 1 MONTH) END where id in
#{item}

update server_resources set sales_status = CASE WHEN DATE_SUB(lease_expiration_time, INTERVAL 3 MONTH ) <= NOW() THEN 'NOT_SALE' ELSE sales_status END, resource_tenant = CASE WHEN DATE_SUB(lease_expiration_time, INTERVAL 3 MONTH) <= NOW() THEN NULL ELSE resource_tenant END, lease_expiration_time= CASE WHEN DATE_SUB(lease_expiration_time, INTERVAL 3 MONTH) <= NOW() THEN NULL ELSE DATE_SUB(lease_expiration_time, INTERVAL 3 MONTH) END where id in
#{item}
update server_resources set sales_status = 'NOT_SALE',lease_expiration_time = null, resource_tenant = null,status = 'WAIT_NOTIFY' where id = #{resourcesId}
mapper.select: select id, resources_ip, resources_port, resources_password, resources_status, resource_tenant, lease_expiration_time, sales_status, available_status, vendor_account_id, resources_user_name, node_port, public_broker_key, sni, short_id, user_id, commodity_id, is_deleted, create_user, update_user, create_time, update_time from server_resources where id = #{id} and is_deleted = 0

select distinct commodity_id from server_resources where is_deleted = 0 and commodity_id in
#{item}
select count(1) from server_resources where is_deleted = 0 and vendor_account_id = #{accountId}

select id, resources_ip, resources_port, resources_password, resources_status, resource_tenant, lease_expiration_time, sales_status, available_status, vendor_account_id, resources_user_name, node_port, public_broker_key, sni, short_id, user_id, commodity_id from server_resources where resources_ip = #{ip} and is_deleted = 0

select sr.id as resourcesId, sr.resources_ip resourcesIp, sr.commodity_id as commodityId, c.commodity_name as commodityName, c.category_id as commodityCategoryId, cc.category_name as commodityCategoryName, vi.vendor_name as vendorName, sr.resources_status, sr.sales_status, sr.available_status, sr.vendor_account_id, sr.resources_port as resourcesPort, sr.resources_password resourcesPassword, sr.resources_user_name resourcesUsername from server_resources sr left join commodity c on sr.commodity_id = c.id left join commodity_category cc on c.category_id = cc.id left join vendor_account_information vai on sr.vendor_account_id = vai.id left join vendor_information vi on vai.vendor_id = vi.id where 1=1 and sr.is_deleted = 0 and sr.id=#{id}

select * from server_resources where commodity_id = #{commodityId} and is_deleted = 0 and sales_status = 'NOT_SALE' and available_status = 1 and (lease_expiration_time is null or lease_expiration_time < date_sub(now(), interval 30 minute) ) order by update_time limit 1 for update skip locked
select * from server_resources where id = #{resourcesId} and is_deleted = 0
select * from server_resources where id = #{resourcesId} and is_deleted = 0 for update

select sr.id,sr.resources_ip, resources_port, resources_password, resources_status, resource_tenant, lease_expiration_time, sales_status, available_status, vendor_account_id, resources_user_name, node_port, public_broker_key, sni, short_id, sr.commodity_id,password from server_resources sr join order_renewal_resources osr on sr.id = osr.resources_id join `order` o on o.id = osr.order_id where 1=1 and sr.is_deleted = 0 and sr.available_status = 1 and o.id = #{id} for update

select ois.commodity_id, ois.commodity_name, ois.commodity_desc as commodityDesc, ois.category_id as categoryId, ois.category_name, ois.category_desc as categoryDesc, ois.bandwidth, o.user_id, ois.ip as ip from `order` o left join order_information_snapshot ois on o.id = ois.order_id where o.id= #{orderId}
select * from server_resources where is_deleted = 0

select ois.commodity_id, ois.commodity_name, ois.commodity_desc as commodityDesc, ois.category_id as categoryId, ois.category_name, ois.category_desc as categoryDesc, ois.bandwidth, o.user_id, ois.ip as ip from `order` o left join order_information_snapshot ois on o.id = ois.order_id where o.id= #{orderId}
select * from server_resources where is_deleted = 0 and resources_status in ('NORMAL','WAIT_CHECK')
select * from server_resources where is_deleted = 0 and resources_status = #{resourcesStatus}
select * from server_resources where is_deleted = 0 and id = #{resourcesId} for update

select id, resources_ip, resources_port, resources_user_name, resources_password, resources_status, resource_tenant, lease_expiration_time, sales_status, available_status, vendor_account_id, node_port, public_broker_key, sni, short_id, user_id, commodity_id, password, is_deleted, create_user, update_user, create_time, update_time from server_resources where is_deleted = 0 and sales_status = 'SALE' and lease_expiration_time is not null and lease_expiration_time < date_sub(now(), interval 30 minute)

select * from server_resources where ( status = 'WAIT_NOTIFY' or status is null ) and sales_status = 'SALE' and lease_expiration_time <= DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL 3 DAY) and lease_expiration_time >= NOW() and is_deleted = 0 limit #{limit}

select * from server_resources where commodity_id = #{commodityId} and is_deleted = 0 and sales_status = 'NOT_SALE' and resources_status = 'NORMAL' and available_status = 1 order by update_time limit 5
select * from server_resources where id = #{id} and is_deleted = 0 and sales_status = 'NOT_SALE' and resources_status = 'NORMAL' and available_status = 1 for update skip locked

SELECT SEC_TO_TIME(SUM(TIMESTAMPDIFF(SECOND, begin_time, end_time))) AS faultTime FROM ry_vue.server_resource_alarm WHERE resource_id = #{resourcesId} AND is_deleted = 0 AND begin_time IS NOT NULL AND end_time IS NOT NULL AND begin_time >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 30 DAY);
mapper.insert: insert into server_resources(id,resources_ip, resources_port, resources_password, resources_status, resource_tenant, lease_expiration_time, sales_status, available_status, vendor_account_id, resources_user_name, node_port, public_broker_key, sni, short_id, user_id, commodity_id,password, is_deleted, create_user, update_user, create_time, update_time) values (#{id},#{resourcesIp}, #{resourcesPort}, #{resourcesPassword}, #{resourcesStatus}, #{resourceTenant}, #{leaseExpirationTime}, #{salesStatus}, #{availableStatus}, #{vendorAccountId}, #{resourcesUserName}, #{nodePort}, #{publicBrokerKey}, #{sni}, #{shortId}, #{userId}, #{commodityId},#{password}, #{isDeleted}, #{createUser}, #{updateUser}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})
mapper.select: select count(1) from server_resources where is_deleted = 0
select count(1) from server_resources where is_deleted = 0 and sales_status = 'SALE'
